muxt generate
muxt check

exec go test -cover

cat template_routes.go

-- template.gohtml --
{{define "GET / M()" -}}
	{{template "page" . -}}
{{- end}}

{{define "GET /f F()" -}}
	{{template "page" . -}}
{{- end}}

{{define "GET /fn FN(N())" -}}
	{{template "page" . -}}
{{- end}}

{{define "page" -}}
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang='en'>
<head>
    <meta charset='UTF-8'/>
    <title>Hello!</title>
</head>
<body>
<h1>Number {{.Result}}</h1>
</body>
</html>
{{end}}

-- go.mod --
module example.com

go 1.26
-- template.go --
package server

import (
	"embed"
	"html/template"
)

//go:embed *.gohtml
var formHTML embed.FS

type T struct{}

func F() any { return 32 }

func FN(v any) any { return v }

func (T) M() any { return F() }

func (T) N() any { return 32 }

var templates = template.Must(template.ParseFS(formHTML, "*"))
-- template_test.go --
package server

import (
	"net/http"
	"net/http/httptest"
	"strings"
	"testing"
)

func TestM(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()

	var service T
	TemplateRoutes(mux, service)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/", nil)
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()

	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	checkResult(t, rec)
}

func TestF(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()

	var service T
	TemplateRoutes(mux, service)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/f", nil)
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()

	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	checkResult(t, rec)
}

// TestFN covers a package-scope function receiving the result of a nested
// receiver method call: N must be part of the generated receiver interface.
func TestFN(t *testing.T) {
	mux := http.NewServeMux()

	var service T
	TemplateRoutes(mux, service)

	req := httptest.NewRequest(http.MethodGet, "/fn", nil)
	rec := httptest.NewRecorder()

	mux.ServeHTTP(rec, req)

	checkResult(t, rec)
}

func checkResult(t *testing.T, rec *httptest.ResponseRecorder) {
	t.Helper()

	res := rec.Result()

	if res.StatusCode != http.StatusOK {
		t.Error("expected OK")
	}

	body := rec.Body.String()
	if !strings.Contains(body, "Number 32") {
		t.Errorf("missing %q", "Number 32")
	}
	if t.Failed() {
		t.Log(body)
	}
}
